meta_title: How to Accurately Calculate ROI Formally
meta_description: Learn the official formula and discover how to analyze your investment ventures like a professional.

hero.title: Dominating Return On Investment
hero.subtitle: The universal language used by angel investors, founders, and marketers worldwide.

content.text: Return on Investment distills the sheer efficiency of an independent operation down to a pure percentage metric.
The classic algorithm: (Net Gain from Investment / Total Cost of Investment) * 100.
Many people calculate gross income against ad-spend and call it ROI. That is mathematically flawed. True ROI requires deducting server costs, labor, taxes, and every fractional COGS associated.
